working_on: Tighten the Phase 5 audit master plan: (1) change the methodology amendment's discretionary SHOULD to a hard prohibition on routine-mode use of the empirical-fortification branch pre-first-exercise; (2) amend the Forward pointers to closeout section to name fortification of pre-S-0106 medium-confidence verdicts as a closeout deliverable.
declared_scope: Two surgical amendments to engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md before the user re-enables routine sessions: (a) in the Optional empirical-fortification branch subsection added at S-0106, replace the discretionary SHOULD with a MUST NOT for routine-mode use until the build-readiness gate's T1-A through T1-D close; (b) in the Forward pointers to closeout section, add a row naming fortification of pre-S-0106 medium-confidence verdicts (S-0104 cross-bridges 8-edge reversal cluster + 14 historical-not-pedagogical findings; S-0105 epistemology 1 reversal + 1 granularity-mismatch; accumulated medium-confidence findings from the 8 remaining subdomains) as a closeout deliverable. Close S-0107 with STATE.md last-session row + ENGINE_LOG [Unreleased] Changed entry.

scope_delivery.explanation: Both amendments landed at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (commit 1dbdfb6 + this close commit's STATE/ENGINE_LOG updates). Amendment 1: §"Empirical-fortification branch" retitled (drops Optional; adds tightened-at-S-0107); routine-mode prohibition is now load-bearing (MUST NOT until T1-A through T1-D close); cost-benefit triage replaces OPTIONAL prose with three explicit rules. Amendment 2: §"Forward pointers to closeout" gains a new paragraph naming fortification scope (S-0104 cross-bridges + S-0105 epistemology + 8 remaining subdomains + AUDIT-HT) as a mandatory closeout deliverable; closeout named as the first interactive exercise of fetch_structural_reference.py per ADR 0053; outcome_summary fields specified. STATE.md S-0107 row added; S-0106 demoted to (prior); next-session-work-item updated to S-0108+ with the routine-mode prohibition noted explicitly. ENGINE_LOG [Unreleased] Changed section authored. No descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session.

outcome_summary: Tightened two pieces of the Phase 5 audit master plan before the user re-enabled routine sessions. Amendment 1 changed the §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode permission from discretionary SHOULD to load-bearing MUST NOT (until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout); the cost-benefit triage now reads as three explicit rules rather than OPTIONAL prose. Amendment 2 added a new paragraph in §"Forward pointers to closeout" naming fortification scope across S-0104 cross-bridges, S-0105 epistemology, and the 8 remaining subdomain audits + AUDIT-HT; closeout is named as the first interactive exercise of fetch_structural_reference.py per ADR 0053. STATE.md + ENGINE_LOG.md updated. MemPalace boot search surfaced a relevant S-0076 precedent: audit_archive_structured_fields.py has a known gap with git-mv renames (--diff-filter=A doesn't match R) — confirmed twice now, S-0076 and S-0106 both tripped the same recovery cycle (git reset --soft HEAD~1 + recommit). Out of scope for S-0107 (user scoped this session to two amendments before routine resumption); flagged in session summary for user adjudication on whether to file as Issue now or queue for next interactive session. Validator at shutdown: 0 hard-fails; 371 soft-warns (all baseline carryovers — 366 missing_rigor_score + 4 issue_collision + 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit). Two commits beyond eager-claim: deliverable + close.
